description: X-Team is a gang associated with the Bandidos Motorcycle Club, founded in Denmark in 1997 after the Nordic Biker War. Members are not required to own a motorcycle and act as a street gang recruiting young criminals to carry out crimes such as debt collection and drug dealing on behalf of the Bandidos. The gang had approximately 350 members at its peak in 2002 and operated in multiple countries. The Danish branch was eventually disbanded after the Bandidos lost control.
